title: senecio productus subsp. productus
intro: Senecio productus subsp. productus, also known as the Rocky Mountain ragwort, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Senecio productus subsp. productus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it, as its toxicity can vary depending on the subspecies and preparation method.
